title: Hot Water Tank Installation
desc: We provide professional hot water tank installation services for residential and commercial properties. Our team ensures safe removal of old units and proper installation of new, energy-efficient systems. We handle all connections, testing, and safety checks to ensure reliable hot water supply and optimal performance. Whether it’s a replacement or new installation, we deliver efficient, code-compliant solutions for long-term comfort and reliability.

​We Respect Your Property

Our technicians treat every property with care and professionalism. We work cleanly, protect your space during service, and ensure the job site is left tidy and damage-free.

​

Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed

Your satisfaction is our priority. If you are not satisfied with our service, workmanship, or professionalism, our team will work with you to make it right.

​

Fast & Reliable Service

We understand that repairs and maintenance are important for your home or business. Our team responds quickly and works efficiently to resolve issues and minimize disruption.

​

Quality Workmanship

We take pride in delivering high-quality installations, repairs, and maintenance services. Our experienced technicians ensure every job is completed to professional standards so your systems operate safely and efficiently.

[GET QUOTE](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

## Why Choose a Tankless Water Heater?

![Wall-Mounted Water Heater](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_2ea87f8e3a634887903262b796525561~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_2636,y_0,w_2364,h_2364/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Wall-Mounted%20Water%20Heater.jpg)

![An hvac guy installing a tankless water heater.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_2f6495e4eecb4aac8a971e7115b19a37~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/An%20hvac%20guy%20installing%20a%20tankless%20water%20heater.jpg)

01

Unlimited Hot Water\
Say goodbye to cold showers! Tankless water heaters deliver a continuous flow of hot water, perfect for large families or homes with high water demand.

02

Compact, Space-Saving Design\
With a sleek, wall-mounted profile, tankless water heaters free up valuable space in your home while adding a modern touch.

03

Energy-Efficient & Eco-Friendly\
Enjoy lower energy bills while reducing your environmental impact. These high-efficiency units heat water only when needed, conserving energy.

04

Built to Last\
Tankless water heaters can last up to 20 years, outliving traditional storage tanks and providing long-term reliability.
